title: Export ERD as SVG or PNG
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing an ERD, I want to export the diagram as SVG or PNG, so that I can share or embed it in documentation and presentations.
description:
## Context
Users need to share ERD diagrams outside the application for documentation, presentations, or reviews.

## Behavior
Download icons are added to the ERD toolbar offering two export formats:
- **SVG** — scalable vector format for high-quality embedding
- **PNG** — raster format for quick sharing

GoJS natively supports both export formats, so the implementation leverages its built-in export APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Download icons for SVG and PNG are visible in the ERD toolbar
Clicking SVG export downloads the current diagram as an SVG file
Clicking PNG export downloads the current diagram as a PNG file
Exported images include all visible nodes and relationships
Export captures the current toggle state (expanded/contracted, labels/API names)
ux_changes: New SVG and PNG download icons in the ERD toolbar. Clicking each triggers a client-side export of the current diagram state.
implementation_notes: Uses GoJS built-in makeSvg() and makeImage() APIs for export. Export captures the current diagram state including all toggle settings.
comment_summary: Reporter attached a screenshot showing the export icons in the toolbar.
